prompt: Theme: fingertips unraveling shadows Subject: Vertical 2:3 photo. A young woman stands slightly to the right of the center in a Japanese alley lined with old wooden shops. Captured from the top of her head to near her thighs, she occupies about 55% of the frame. Highlights a dark wall in the background and strong sunlight streaming diagonally from the top right. Figure/Expression: Light ivory-beige skin with natural color and delicate texture. Pale rose blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin lashes, natural tear troughs, soft light eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lips. Her expression is quiet and somewhat pensive, with her face turned slightly to the left and her gaze looking into the distance. A small catchlight in her eyes. Clothing/Pose: a thin white sleeveless blouse. Cool summer wear made of soft cotton with fine pin-tucks and subtle lace, naturally showing her shoulders and collarbone. The bottom is a light high-waisted flared skirt with a pale blue floral pattern. Her right hand is raised to her temple, gently smoothing her hair with her fingertips. Her right elbow is bent outward, and her left arm hangs naturally at her side. Her weight is slightly shifted to one leg, with her shoulders relaxed. Background/Light: An old wooden shopping street with remnants of the Showa era. Faded wooden boards, peeling paper, old signs, and blurred unreadable Japanese-style posters. Deep shadows in the foreground and on the left side; hard warm light from the top right hits her face, shoulders, chest, and right arm. The light creates a large diagonal triangle, casting dense shadows behind her and to the lower left. Soft brown reflected light from the wooden walls bounces onto her skin. Composition/Camera: Nearly eye-level view from slightly below the chest. 50mm equivalent, about 2.5 meters from the subject. She is placed slightly to the right of center, leaving wide dark areas at the top and left. A diagonal line separates the bright wall at the top right from the black shadows on the left. Focus accurately on the face and right hand, with the background lightly blurred while keeping wood and paper textures distinguishable. Texture/Style: A realistic Japanese fashion portrait. Natural skin, individual strands of hair visible, thin milk tea ash-brown highlights, thin see-through bangs, layers around the face, medium-long hair down to the shoulders. The ends are loosely curled inward, with a few stray hairs catching the light. Based on low-saturation browns, ivories, and pale blues, with soft film grain and deep blacks. Negative: Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, broken wrists or elbows, fusion of hair and fingers, clothes too transparent, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, readable text, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.

promptZh: 主题：指尖拨开阴影 主体：竖构图 2:3 照片。一位年轻女性站在一处排列着老式木质店铺的日式巷弄中，位置略微偏右。画面取景从头顶到大腿附近，人物占据约 55% 的画幅。背景强调一面深色墙壁，强烈的阳光从右上角斜射而入。人物/表情：浅象牙米色皮肤，肤色自然，质感细腻。淡玫瑰色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，长而纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。她的表情 安静且略带沉思，脸部微微向左转，目光望向远方。眼中带有细小的眼神光。服装/姿势：一件轻薄的白色无袖衬衫。采用柔软棉质面料的清凉夏装，带有细密的褶皱和精致的蕾丝，自然地露出肩膀和锁骨。下身搭配浅蓝色碎花高腰伞裙。她的右手抬起至太阳穴，指尖轻轻梳理着头发。右肘向外弯曲，左臂自然垂在身侧。重心略微偏移至一条腿上，双肩放松。背景/光影：一条带有昭和时代遗风的老式木质商业街。褪色的木板、剥落的纸张、旧招牌以及模糊不清的日式海报。前景和左侧有深邃的阴影；来自右上方的硬质暖光照射在她的脸部、肩膀、胸部和右臂上。光线形成一个巨大的对角三角形，在她身后和左下方投下浓重的阴影。木墙反射出的柔和棕色光线映照在她的皮肤上。构图/相机：近乎平视视角，略低于胸部。50mm 等效焦距，距离主体约 2.5 米。她位于画面中心偏右位置，在顶部和左侧留出大面积的暗部空间。一条对角线将右上方的明亮墙面与左侧的黑色阴影隔开。焦点精准对准脸部和右手，背景轻微虚化，同时保持木材和纸张的纹理清晰可辨。纹理/风格：一张写实的日系时尚人像。自然的皮肤质感，可见单根发丝，带有奶茶灰棕色的细挑染，轻薄的透视刘海，脸周层次感，中长发垂至肩部。发尾向内自然卷曲，几缕散落的发丝捕捉着光线。色调基于低饱和度的棕色、象牙色和浅蓝色，带有柔和的胶片颗粒感和深邃的黑色。负面提示词：不自然的脸部，不自然的目光，多余的手指，缺失的手指，折断的手腕或手肘，头发与手指融合，衣服过于透明，悬浮，不自然的重力，错误的透视，与光源不一致的阴影，可读文字，乱码，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。
